  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

BSW_Standalone_X45

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 795
Recv ID: 7B5
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6B
Func Name: BSW

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "4G3",
    "soft": "0400",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 42806,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {
      "ECUvoltage": "0"
    },
    "name": "ECU"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42798,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "BSW front left sensor"
  },

    "name": "BSW rear left sensor"

    "name": "BSW rear right sensor"
  },
  {

  },
  {

  },
  {

    },
    "name": "Sensor Supply problem"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42802,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "BSW switch LED"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42804,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LED BSW left"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42805,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "LED BSW right"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 42807,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {
      "Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdHighActivationSpeed": "0",

      "Cfg.BSW_ThresholdSpeed.ThresholdLowDeactivationSpeed": "0",

    },
    "name": "BSW Configuration"
  }
]
